non_claims: does not give a uniform bound when W grows with n
does not supply the terminal moment/member count
does not assemble f_termination_hankel by itself

row_deficient.claim: corrected binary-apolarity gives a principal GRS segment after root-at-infinity strip
row_deficient.consequence: MDS zero-support matroid, no unpaid closure entropy

row_full_wide.consequence: all weight-<=W atoms lie in one saturated rational class, so Delta_u <= 1

total_bound: unpaid primitive saturated states <= n^{O(W^2)} for fixed W
